explanation: The user asks to get a pot and wash it. First, I need to pick up the pot, which is a new object, so I use pot_0. I then place it in the sinkbasin to wash it. To wash the pot, I turn on and off the faucet, which simulates the washing action. After washing, I pick up the pot again and place it back on the countertop. This sequence ensures the pot is obtained, washed, and returned to a safe location.
